text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph... A win's a win, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It wasn't a bad race. I was able to give it my all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...But, it's not enough. I'm still tingling with
passion...
choice_data_list: Let's find the next worthy opponent!
Want to train when we get back?
Want to train when we get back?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...But, it's not enough. I'm still tingling with
passion...
choice_data_list: Let's find the next worthy opponent!
Want to train when we get back?
Want to train when we get back?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to meet people who fire me up, enough
to satisfy this hunger.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's why... I just have to run.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Absolutely. I won't be able to sleep otherwise.
choice_data_list: Be sure to get some rest after!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I know, I know. ...You've always got to have the
last word, huh?
